heading: Statement in annual report
label: 6806 Statement in annual report
text: The Secretary shall include in each annual report submitted under a statement with respect to activities conducted under this subchapter and recommendations as to the need for and types of further Federal legislation.section 7267 of this title
notes: Amendments1980— substituted “The Secretary shall include in each annual report submitted under a statement” for “Not later than the last day in December in each year, the Secretary shall transmit to the Congress a report”.Pub. L. 96–470section 7267 of this title1978— substituted “Secretary” for “Administrator”, meaning Administrator of the Federal Energy Administration.Pub. L. 95–617
amendments: Amendments1980— substituted “The Secretary shall include in each annual report submitted under a statement” for “Not later than the last day in December in each year, the Secretary shall transmit to the Congress a report”.Pub.
